steps.title: Identify what the underlined sentence does
steps.content: The underlined sentence notes a characteristic shared by certain modern animals. The passage then explains that this observation led researchers to form a hypothesis about mammoths — a hypothesis that was later contradicted by data presented in the text. So the sentence functions as a basis for a hypothesis that the evidence does not support.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices and confirm the answer
steps.content:
Match each choice against that function:
  • Choice A — 'It discusses a characteristic shared by certain animals in order to explain why researchers raised a possibility that turned out not to be supported by data described later in the text.': Describes the sentence exactly — it sets up a hypothesis that the data fails to support. ✓
  • Choice B — 'It illustrates a pattern of behavior among certain animals in order to present a theory about exceptions to that pattern that is weakened by a finding described later in the text.': The passage never discusses exceptions to the animals' pattern; it applies the pattern to mammoths. ✗
  • Choice C — 'It describes a similarity in the behavior of certain animals in order to show why a method described later in the text did not reveal whether another animal also showed that behavior.': The researchers do test whether mammoths showed the trait; the method is not described as inconclusive in that way. ✗
  • Choice D — 'It introduces a trait shared by certain animals in order to contextualize a hypothesis about the origin of that trait that is advanced later in the text.': The text explores whether mammoths shared the trait, not where the trait originated. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
